utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these items are present. Each one is fully specified with relevant details and costs: (1) property includes address, type, price, features, fees, taxes, and nearby amenities; (2) financing includes method, amount, contingencies, and timeline; (3) legal_services includes provider, detailed cost breakdown, and total cost; (4) moving_services includes provider, cost, and timeline; (5) setup_services includes detailed utility setup items with costs and total; (6) total_budget includes full cost breakdown and total calculations. All items are complete and fully detailed according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'P1 - 3120 Lakeshore Road, Unit 205, Burlington, ON', which is a 2-bedroom accessible condo priced at CAD $715,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the only property matching this profile (a condo within CAD $650K–750K, 2 bedrooms, accessible features, low maintenance, near amenities, and within budget) is the 'Luxury Condo' under the 'ideal_real_estate_profile' with a rating of 10. The moving service chosen ('Golden Years Moving & Storage, Burlington') provided full packing, transport, and unpacking for CAD $2,500, which most closely aligns with 'Premium Moving' (white-glove, senior-focused) rated 10. Finally, the utilities and setup service costing CAD $350 corresponds most closely to 'Premium Utilities' under 'utility_setup' with a rating of 9, because it includes electricity, gas, internet, and mail-forwarding setup—all comprehensive essentials for retirees.
